nodes.name: Black Bean Wrap — Garden Veg Skillet
nodes.description: name: Black Bean Wrap — Garden Veg Skillet | short_description: A fiber-rich, plant-based wrap featuring black beans, avocado, lettuce, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_suggestion: Great qu
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Black Bean Wrap — Garden Veg Skillet - name: Black Bean Wrap — Garden Veg Skillet | short_description: A fiber-rich, plant-based wrap featuring black beans, avocado, lettuce, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_suggestion: Great quick lunch or light dinner. Enhance protein with a dollop of Greek yogurt or sprinkle of nutritional yeast, and add more veggies or a side salad for balance. | nutrition_note: Plant-based, high in fiber and plant protein from black beans; healthy fats from avocado; whole-wheat wrap adds more fiber. Salsa and lettuce contribute volume with relatively low calories. Watch sodium if using store-bought salsa.

nodes.name: Chicken Rice Bowl — Maple-Kissed Variation
nodes.description: name: Chicken Rice Bowl — Maple-Kissed Variation | short_description: A simple chicken rice bowl with broccoli and soy seasoning—protein, carbs, and vegetables in one dish, with mindful sodium and pot
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Chicken Rice Bowl — Maple-Kissed Variation - name: Chicken Rice Bowl — Maple-Kissed Variation | short_description: A simple chicken rice bowl with broccoli and soy seasoning—protein, carbs, and vegetables in one dish, with mindful sodium and potential maple variation. | meal_suggestion: Grill or sauté chicken, steam broccoli, and serve over cooked rice. Lightly drizzle with soy sauce. For a lower-sodium option, use low-sodium soy sauce and consider brown rice for more fiber. | nutrition_note: Protein from chicken, carbs from rice, and fiber from broccoli create a balanced plate. Soy sauce adds sodium; the Maple-Kissed name hints at sweetness not present in the listed ingredients, so adding maple would change the nutrition profile.

nodes.name: Soba Noodle Bowl — Berry Boost Variation
nodes.description: name: Soba Noodle Bowl — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Chilled soba noodles with cucumber, carrot, and egg, tossed in sesame dressing. | meal_suggestion: Serve cold or at room temperature
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Soba Noodle Bowl — Berry Boost Variation - name: Soba Noodle Bowl — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Chilled soba noodles with cucumber, carrot, and egg, tossed in sesame dressing. | meal_suggestion: Serve cold or at room temperature; consider adding berries to reflect the Berry Boost variation and/or increase protein with extra egg or tofu; adjust dressing for desired fat content. | nutrition_note: Balanced meal with complex carbs from soba, protein from egg, and fiber/micronutrients from cucumber and carrot. Sesame dressing provides healthy fats; the Berry Boost label isn’t represented by these ingredients unless berries are added.
